system_context: low slack high utilization and brittle optimization
critical_function: tests how high efficiency without reserves converts disruption into functional loss and human burden

system_context: cash reserve with thin staffing and weak human capacity
critical_function: tests whether financial reserves can compensate for low staffing depth recovery time and workforce protection

system_context: balanced financial workforce operational knowledge network governance and ethics
critical_function: tests how balanced slack portfolios sustain function and reduce strain under repeated disruption

system_context: strong memory and expertise but weak liquidity and operational reserves
critical_function: tests whether knowledge and memory can preserve adaptation when financial and operational slack are thin

system_context: public service system with thin fiscal and administrative slack
critical_function: tests public-service continuity when fiscal capacity administrative depth and governance flexibility are constrained

system_context: moderate internal slack with high external dependency exposure
critical_function: tests whether internal buffers compensate for weak supplier optionality route alternatives and external coordination
